description: Step 2/5: Scan installed programs on Windows and save report
command_preview:
import subprocess, json, os

print('=== STEP 2/5: Installed Programs Scan ===')
print()

# Use WMIC to get installed programs
try:
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['wmic', 'product', 'get', 'Name,Version,Vendor', '/format:csv'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=90
    )
    lines = [l.strip() for l in result.stdout.strip().split('\n') if l.strip()]
    programs = []
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split(',')
        if len(parts) >= 4:
            programs.app
